summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM immobilier DJERBA CONSTRUCTION completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working with luxury design, multilingual support (FR/AR/EN with RTL), temperature-based leads, WhatsApp AI integration, and export functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Temperature dropdown selection has overlay interception issues in modal

integration_issues.issue: AI response not immediately visible in UI after sending test message

passed_tests: Language switcher (FR/AR/EN with RTL for Arabic)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Clients, Apartments, WhatsApp, Settings)
Clients page with temperature classification and export buttons
WhatsApp AI page with conversation history
Settings page with residences, notifications, and users
